music_theory: Fibonacci sequence in music: intervals 1,1,2,3,5,8,13,21 relate to harmonic ratios. Golden ratio phi=1.618 appears in chord progressions and rhythmic patterns. Pentatonic scales follow natural harmonic series. Bach's fugues demonstrate mathematical symmetry in counterpoint.
psychology: Psychological profiles of electronic music listeners: high openness to experience, prefer complexity and novelty, respond to emotional intensity and texture. Cognitive load theory suggests structured prompts reduce mental effort. Framing effects influence perception of AI-generated content.
prompt_engineering: Best practices: clear role definition, explicit output format, few-shot examples, chain-of-thought reasoning, temperature calibration per task. System prompts should establish persona, constraints, and expected behavior. Use delimiters for multi-section prompts. Iterative refinement improves output quality by 30-50%.
creative_writing: Effective creative prompts leverage sensory details, emotional anchors, and narrative tension. Metaphor density should match audience sophistication. Story arcs follow: setup, confrontation, resolution. Voice consistency requires explicit style guides.
technical_docs: Technical documentation prompts benefit from structured templates, explicit terminology constraints, and audience-level calibration. API docs should include: description, parameters, return values, examples, error codes.
